sql_array: CREATE TABLE spatial_data (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, geo_point GEOMETRY, info TEXT);
INSERT INTO spatial_data (geo_point, info) VALUES (ST_GeomFromText('POINT(1 1)'), 'Test point 1');
INSERT INTO spatial_data (geo_point, info) VALUES (ST_GeomFromText('POINT(2 2)'), NULL);
SELECT postgis_proj_version() AS proj_version, info FROM spatial_data WHERE info LIKE '%' OR geo_point IS NULL;
SELECT info FROM spatial_data WHERE geo_point LIKE 'POINT(1 %' AND postgis_proj_version() IS NOT NULL;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM spatial_data GROUP BY info HAVING postgis_proj_version() LIKE '4.0%' OR COUNT(*) IS NULL;
SELECT postgis_proj_version(), CASE WHEN info LIKE 'Test%' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS test_check FROM spatial_data ORDER BY test_check;
SELECT * FROM spatial_data WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM spatial_data WHERE geo_point IS NOT NULL AND info LIKE 'Test%' AND postgis_proj_version() IS NOT NULL);
WITH data_summary AS (SELECT info, COUNT(*) AS count FROM spatial_data GROUP BY info) SELECT info FROM data_summary WHERE count > 1 AND info LIKE '%' || postgis_proj_version();
CREATE TABLE temp_data (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, num_value NUMERIC, text_value TEXT DEFAULT 'Default');
INSERT INTO temp_data (num_value, text_value) VALUES (1.12345678901234, 'Another Test');
SELECT postgis_proj_version() AS version, num_value FROM temp_data WHERE text_value LIKE 'Test%' OR num_value IS NULL;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM temp_data GROUP BY text_value HAVING COUNT(num_value) > 1 AND postgis_proj_version() LIKE '4%';
